# .github

This directory contains repository-level automation and collaboration settings, including workflows, instructions, and supporting rules.

- [`agents`](./agents/README.en.md): agent or automation collaboration notes
- [`instructions`](./instructions/README.en.md): project rules or prompt instructions
- [`modernize`](./modernize/README.en.md): modernization materials
- [`workflows`](./workflows/README.en.md): GitHub Actions workflows
